title: Dan Ives Says AI Needs 'New Kind of Bank' as He Announces Launch of Yorkville Ives: 'This Is the Next Step for Me'
excerpt: Former Wedbush technology analyst Dan Ives on Wednesday launched Yorkville Ives, a new merchant bank aimed at companies and investors navigating the artifici...
content_html:
Benzinga and Yahoo Finance LLC may earn commission or revenue on some items through the links below.

Former Wedbush technology analyst Dan Ives on Wednesday launched Yorkville Ives, a new merchant bank aimed at companies and investors navigating the artificial intelligence era.

A Merchant Bank Built For The AI Era

Ives partnered with Yorkville Securities to form the merchant bank, combining Yorkville's principal investing and capital markets expertise with Ives' technology research experience.

In announcing the launch, Ives said the firm was designed to bring together research, banking, trading and capital under one platform as AI reshapes global capital markets.

Don't Miss:

  • A single bad hire can set a startup back years. Here are the 5 hires founders most often misjudge — and why

  • Still Learning the Market? These 50 Must-Know Terms Can Help You Catch Up Fast

Calling AI the "fourth industrial revolution," Ives said the scale of the transformation requires "a new kind of bank" capable of supporting companies through what he described as the biggest transformation markets have ever seen.

I am excited to announce that this morning we are launching the new modern merchant bank, Yorkville Ives. This is the next step for me in my Wall Street career and look forward to speaking soon. I will be based in NYC area. 🏆💥👇https://t.co/gAQF0tjSPQ

— Dan Ives (@DivesTech) July 15, 2026

Integrated Services Across Growth Sectors

Yorkville Ives said it will combine debt and equity capital raising, principal investing, institutional trading, independent research, and strategic advisory services into a single platform serving companies across public and private markets.

The launch comes weeks after Ives announced he was leaving Wedbush after eight years to establish a new investment banking venture.

Yorkville Ives said AI, disruptive technology, energy transition, infrastructure, and industrials are entering a new phase of growth that will require more than traditional investment banking.

Trending: Avoid the #1 Investing Mistake: How Your 'Safe' Holdings Could Be Costing You Big Time

AI Boom Reshapes Capital Markets

The AI boom continues to drive one of the largest investment cycles in decades, with technology companies committing hundreds of billions of dollars to AI infrastructure, data centers and semiconductor capacity.

Ives has also been one of Wall Street's most outspoken AI bulls, maintaining bullish views on companies including Nvidia Corp., Microsoft Corp. and Palantir Technologies Inc. throughout the AI boom.

content_html_zh:
Benzinga 和 Yahoo Finance LLC 可能通过以下链接赚取某些项目的佣金或收入。

前 Wedbush 技术分析师 Dan Ives 周三推出了 Yorkville Ives，这是一家新的商业银行，旨在帮助企业和投资者进入人工智能时代。

专为人工智能时代打造的商业银行

艾夫斯与约克维尔证券合作组建了商业银行，将约克维尔的主要投资和资本市场专业知识与艾夫斯的技术研究经验相结合。

艾夫斯在宣布成立时表示，随着人工智能重塑全球资本市场，该公司旨在将研究、银行、交易和资本汇集在一个平台上。

不要错过：

  • 一次糟糕的招聘可能会让一家初创企业倒退数年。 以下是创始人最常误判的 5 名员工——以及原因
  • 还在学习市场吗？ 这 50 个必须知道的术语可以帮助您快速跟上

艾夫斯将人工智能称为“第四次工业革命”，他表示，转型的规模需要“一种新型银行”，能够支持企业度过他所说的有史以来最大的转型市场。

我很高兴地宣布，今天早上我们将推出新的现代商业银行约克维尔艾夫斯。 这是我在华尔街职业生涯的下一步，期待尽快发表演讲。 我将驻扎在纽约地区。 🏆💥👇https://t.co/gAQF0tjSPQ — Dan Ives (@DivesTech) 2026 年 7 月 15 日

跨增长行业的综合服务

Yorkville Ives 表示，它将把债务和股权融资、本金投资、机构交易、独立研究和战略咨询服务整合到一个单一平台中，为公共和私人市场的公司提供服务。

几周前，艾夫斯宣布离开韦德布什，成立一家新的投资银行企业，工作了八年。

约克维尔·艾夫斯表示，人工智能、颠覆性技术、能源转型、基础设施和工业正在进入一个新的增长阶段，这需要的不仅仅是传统的投资银行业务。

趋势：避免第一大投资错误：你的“安全”持仓可能会让你付出巨大的代价

人工智能热潮重塑资本市场

人工智能热潮继续推动数十年来最大的投资周期之一，科技公司向人工智能基础设施、数据中心和半导体产能投入了数千亿美元。

艾夫斯也是华尔街最直言不讳的人工智能看涨者之一，在整个人工智能繁荣时期，他对英伟达、微软和 Palantir Technologies Inc. 等公司保持看好观点。
